name: Spicy Orange Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the powdered sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, and salt.
2. Stir in the grated orange peel.
3. Blend the egg whites with the orange juice; stir in the nuts, coating each half completely.
4. Drain thoroughly.
5. Roll the nuts in the sugar mixture to coat well.
6. Spread on a cookie sheet so the nuts do not touch.
7. Bake at 250°F for 20-25 minutes, or until dry.
8. Cool before storing in a container.
This sounds like a recipe that would make a good Christmas gift!
